title: Essentials!
description: This Pack Contains a new font, removes the grass texture, and adds glowing ores!
body:
Adds the Glowing ore texture pack, a new font, and removes grass
this pack aims to make your quality of life better. If you're recording the anti grass pack helps out a ton!





- Disclaimer, the content inside of this pack was made by others, im just make a collection of them all, please check them out and donate to them below
